Why Choose Our Expungement Lawyers in Burbank?

We believe that everyone deserves a second chance.

At Farris Law, we understand the magnitude and long-term effects of a criminal record on your personal and professional life.

We also know that not everyone who once committed a crime deserves to have that mistake haunt them for the rest of their lives.

That’s why we are passionate about helping individuals in Burbank and the surrounding areas expunge their records and have a fresh start.

Our experienced criminal defense attorneys know California’s expungement laws and processes. We will work with you to determine your eligibility for expungement and guide you through the entire legal process.

A convenient office location provides a safe space to discuss your case with our compassionate attorneys.

Unable to make it to our firm for an in-person consultation? We offer comprehensive legal services virtually and by phone.

Who is Eligible for Records Expungement in Burbank?

California has an extensive list of requirements that must be met in order to qualify for record expungement.

Factors that may qualify you include:

  • The type of conviction: California allows expungement of many misdemeanors and felony convictions except for those involving violent or sex offense crimes.
  • Completed sentence: In most cases, you must have completed your sentence (including probation) before you can apply for expungement.
  • Good behavior: You must demonstrate that you have not committed any additional crimes since the conviction you seek to expunge.
  • Pending charges: You cannot be facing any current criminal charges to apply for expungement.

You should never assume that your crime can’t be expunged from your record in Burbank. Always seek the guidance of compassionate expungement attorneys to understand if your conviction is eligible.

What is the Expungement Process in Burbank?

The various steps involved in the expungement process are more complicated than the laws dictating who can expunge their records.

The experienced Burbank expungement attorneys at Farris Law can guide you through every step of this multi-stage process, including:

  • Reviewing your criminal record: Our attorneys will carefully review your criminal record to determine if you meet the eligibility requirements for expungement.
  • Preparing and filing legal paperwork: We will assist you with completing all necessary forms required by the court to initiate the expungement process.
  • Serving notice to relevant parties: We can help you serve the required notice of your intent to expunge your record to various agencies and individuals, such as law enforcement, prosecutors, and probation officers.
  • Attending court hearings: Our attorneys will represent you in court hearings to effectively argue for your expungement.
  • Following up with the court: After your expungement is granted, we will ensure that the necessary documents are filed with the appropriate agencies to update your record.

Though this process seems straightforward, it is far from simple. Navigating the legal system is overwhelming, especially involving your criminal record.

That’s why you must have a dedicated and compassionate Burbank expungement lawyer working to protect your rights and help you move forward with a clean slate.

The Benefits of Record Expungement

A criminal conviction, be it a misdemeanor or a felony, can have a lasting impact on your life.

A criminal record can hinder your ability to secure employment, find housing, obtain loans, and even affect your child custody rights.

That’s why many individuals in Burbank choose to pursue expungement, hoping to receive its benefits, which can include:

  • Improving job opportunities: Many employers conduct background checks on potential employees. Having a criminal record may disqualify you from certain jobs or industries. Expunging your record can give you a better chance of securing employment.
  • Restoring civil rights: Certain crimes may result in the loss of voting rights or gun ownership privileges. Expungement can help restore these rights.
  • Gaining peace of mind: A criminal record is stressful and often causes anxiety. Expungement can provide a sense of closure and allow you to move forward without the fear of your past mistakes being discovered.

If you are tired of worrying about your criminal record holding you back from the future you deserve, contact Farris Law to speak with a Burbank expungement attorney.

We are committed to helping individuals like you clear their records and have a fresh start.

Burbank Expungement FAQs

How long does it take to get a record expunged in Burbank?

The timeline for an expungement can vary based on the complexity of your case, but it typically takes between 90 to 120+ days. Trust a criminal defense lawyer from Farris Law to help expedite the process and make it as smooth as possible.

What is the cost of getting a record expunged in Burbank?

The total expungement cost will depend on various factors, such as the complexity of your case and the attorney you choose. However, at Farris Law, we offer competitive rates and payment plans to ensure that our services are affordable for all individuals seeking expungement.

Can I still have my record expunged if I served time in jail or prison?

Yes, you may still be eligible for expungement even if you served time in jail or prison. It is best to consult with an experienced Burbank criminal defense attorney to determine your eligibility.

What is a wobbler offense?

A wobbler offense may be charged as either a misdemeanor or felony. These types of offenses are often eligible for expungement. However, it is best to seek legal advice from an attorney to understand your options.

Who may not apply to have their record expunged in Burbank?

Those currently facing criminal charges, registered sex offenders, and individuals convicted of serious or violent crimes are typically not eligible to have their record expunged. Other factors may include unpaid court fines or restitution. It is always best to consult an attorney to determine your eligibility for expungement.

Ready To Start a New Life? Let a Burbank Expungement Lawyer Help You Move Forward

Never having to worry about your past mistakes showing up on a background check can bring an immense sense of relief and freedom.

Let the experienced attorneys at Farris Law Firm guide you through the expungement process and help you start a new chapter in life with a clean record.
